name: Content creator tool (CCT)
short_description: This is a Content Creator Tool. This tool allows you to display a camera stream in real time into a 3D environement, that you can customise, including adding your own channels and games logos. Used properly the customisation tool let you have unique maps for your unique needs as a content creator !
detailed_description:
This is a Content Creator Tool.
This tool allows you to display a camera stream in real time into a 3D environement, that you can customise, including adding your own channels and games logos.
Used properly the customisation tool let you have unique maps for your unique needs as a content creator !
about_the_game:
This is a Content Creator Tool.
This tool allows you to display a camera stream in real time into a 3D environement, that you can customise, including adding your own channels and games logos.
Used properly the customisation tool let you have unique maps for your unique needs as a content creator !
